type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The provincial government's rules has forced us to dispose of high quality zinc material rather than recycle it like we always have. I don't understand how they can claim to be "green" when they force us into such terrible practices. Even the company that disposes the material for us wants us to stop because it pains them to see such quality material get landfilled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Provincial government essentially will not allow us to recycle due to consequences of legislation

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: less sensitive detection limit means when I use the half of the detection limit it becomes reportable

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Detection limit was supposed to be 0.03ppm and instead was tested at 0.3ppm for 10 of the months so this forces me to report a higher released amount even though I doubt we were ever over 0.03ppm which put us closer to 5kg of lead.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: zinc skims were recycled instead of disposed and they have some lead in them

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: We are now recycling instead of disposing a major source of the zinc by-product

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: We are now recycling instead of disposing a major source of the zinc by-product

reasonsForPlan.en: Plan was prepared or implemented on a voluntary basis
reasonsForPlan.fr: Plan préparé ou mis en œuvre volontairement

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Our stack emissions testing show that repairs to our HCl scrubber (ES1 on GVA0184 permit) means it is emitting HCl at a concentration two orders of magnitude lower than when previous tests took place.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Previous the free acid content in our ferrous chloride (which is taken and converted to ferric chloride for use in municipal wastewater treatment) was not considered because it only made up 0.2% of the contents. However, I have chosen to account for it because the data is available to me.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The person who wrote the report before states that 10237kg of lead were released. This is not correct. According to their calculations the number was 4.26kg. I am unsure of how they could have reached 10237kg. They like made a mistake with "on-site" and "disposal" or "recycling"

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Ministry of Environment would not allow Tree Island to continue recycling the material the way we had and so it was stored on the premise instead of being shipped out for recycling due to cost. In 2023 we have started to ship out some in order to be below our permitted storage levels,
